creator: ka@flu.if0.org
text:
6.2R and 6.3R cannot detect KURO-RS device correctly, which can be
connected with a USB device and operates remote controllers.

Fix: 

The patch written in the following page totally corrects the problem.
  http://home.jp.freebsd.org/cgi-bin/showmail/FreeBSD-users-jp/90628
The page is written in Japanese, but the patch is, of course, written in
C language.
How-To-Repeat: GENERIC kernel detects the device as ugen when KURO-RS is connected to
a USB port.
